policy.sameSegment: Beaches in the same curated shoreline segment should render the same visible exposure level unless a verified local morphology or wind-sport exception locks a stricter level.
policy.confidence: Segment propagation may support map-color consistency and medium review, but it never creates high confidence by itself.

segments.notes: Agia Kyriaki and Agios Ioannis Porto are adjacent southeast-facing Porto bay records; amenities/access remain separate.
Kionia, Stavros, and Tsampia are neighboring south/southwest Tinos records; segment consistency does not upgrade wind confidence.
Empros Dialiskar and Piso Dialiskar are adjacent southwest-facing records with similar shoreline behavior; access remains separate.
Agios Romanos and Apigania are neighboring southwest-coast records; difficult-access status must still block top-pick promotion where relevant.
Kalyvia and Agios Petros are nearby southwest-facing records with similar west-coast exposure behavior.
Ormos Ysternion and Schinaki are adjacent Ysternia bay records and should not diverge without a specific local morphology reason.
Kolympithra and Mikri Kolympithra are close north/northeast-facing records; surf/local behavior should remain separately auditable.
Malli and Koumelas are adjacent north-facing northwest Tinos records with similar open-sector behavior.
